title: IBM India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IBM India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IBM India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
